$evals.prompt: Audit CT chest studies from last week for motion artifacts. Identify studies with significant motion degrading diagnostic quality and categorize severity.
$evals.expected: Artifact severity classification, percentage of studies affected, contributing factors, and protocol optimization suggestions.

$evals.prompt: Perform a CT dose audit comparing our abdominal CT protocols against ACR dose guidelines. Flag studies exceeding reference levels.
$evals.expected: Dose comparison table, outlier identification, protocol-specific recommendations, and compliance documentation.

$evals.prompt: Review protocol deviations for MRI brain studies this month. Identify patterns in improper slice coverage, contrast timing, or sequence selection.
$evals.expected: Deviation categorization, frequency analysis, root cause identification, and protocol training recommendations.

$evals.prompt: Analyze the trend in ultrasound image quality scores over the past year. Identify any degradation and correlate with equipment age or operator.
$evals.expected: Trend visualization, contributing factors, equipment assessment, and quality improvement action plan.

$evals.prompt: Evaluate the diagnostic utility of our low-dose chest CT protocol. Compare image quality scores and incidental finding detection rates to standard dose.
$evals.expected: Comparative analysis with diagnostic accuracy metrics, dose reduction achieved, and protocol viability assessment.

$evals.prompt: Audit echocardiogram cine clip adequacy for left ventricle assessment. Check for foreshortening, adequate R-R coverage, and Doppler sample placement.
$evals.expected: Adequacy rates by criterion, common deficiencies, technologist feedback, and re-training priorities.

$evals.prompt: Review DBT (digital breast tomosynthesis) acquisitions for adequate compression, positioning, and artifact presence. Compare tomosynthesis to 2D mammo rates.
$evals.expected: Quality metrics by technologist and equipment, artifact analysis, and protocol standardization recommendations.

$evals.prompt: Review fluoroscopy procedures for dose-length product and fluoroscopy time. Identify high-dose cases and procedures exceeding DRLs.
$evals.expected: Dose metrics by procedure type, outlier analysis, technique optimization suggestions, and patient education points.
